deaths_by_cause.Starvation.rationale: Forage yield +20% (0.25 → 0.30) lifts food throughput by roughly the same margin the iteration-1 colony outpaced the stores. Starvation should return to 0 on seed 42.

deaths_by_cause.ShadowFoxAmbush.rationale: Canary — iteration-1 Tier 2C (shadow_fox_corruption_threshold 0.7 → 0.85) stays in place. Expected ≤ 2.

food_cooked_total.rationale: New cooking_pressure_multiplier = 1.5× raises Kitchen BuildPressure accumulation so Kitchen completes before food crisis. Expect ≥ 3 cook events once the Kitchen is functional mid-run.

kittens_born.rationale: mood_valence_p50 was already 0.22 (above 0.20 breeding gate). Stable food + active Kitchen should finally materialize mating. Expect ≥ 1.

energy_p50.rationale: Already lifted by Tier 1A (sleep_energy_per_tick 0.0035) to 0.493. Should hold, may nudge up slightly from improved food baseline.
